description: As the clinical pharmacist, complete a medication safety review in GNU Health for Roberto Carlos, a 68-year-old patient admitted for a fall suspected to be caused by ACE inhibitor-induced orthostatic hypotension. Document the fall-related injury and the ACE inhibitor adverse drug reaction, prescribe a safer antihypertensive alternative, order a post-fall laboratory workup, and schedule a medication review follow-up. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
